content:
MODULE: cosmos.agents.web_agent
FILE: cosmos/agents/web_agent.py (768 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Web Agent - Intelligent Web Browsing

Novel Approaches:
1. Semantic Page Understanding - Extract meaning, not just text
2. Action Planning - Multi-step web interactions
3. Smart Navigation - Learn site patterns
4. Content Synthesis - Combine info across pages

CLASSES:
- ActionType(Enum): Types of web actions.
- PageElement: An interactive element on a page.
- PageState: Current state of a web page.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- WebAction: A web action to perform.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- ActionResult: Result of a web action.
- BrowsingSession: A web browsing session.
- WebAgent: Intelligent web browsing agent.

Features:
- Navigate and interact with web page
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def close(self)
  Methods: async def browse(self, goal: str, start_url: Optional[str]=None, max_actions: int=10) -> BrowsingSes
  Methods: async def fill_form(self, url: str, form_data: dict[str, str], submit: bool=True) -> ActionResult
  Methods: async def extract_structured_data(self, url: str, schema: dict) -> dict
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
